name: Jello Aquarium Recipe
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the Jello Jelly powder in boiling water.
2. Add ice cubes and stir until the jelly thickens, about 3-5 minutes.
3. Remove any unmelted ice.
4. Spoon the jelly into clear-sided bowls.
5. Poke 3 or 4 gummy fish into each bowl of slightly thickened jelly.
6. Refrigerate for 30 minutes to set.
7. Serve after 1-1/2 hours.
